data.body: Implemented 2 clear wins: named _REST_CALL_BUDGET=200 constant; _apply_inbound_update scalar-field transform table (status+labels+title kept special; 346 inbound/apply tests pass). Deliberately deferred 2 high-churn/high-risk items with rationale: create_one DispatchContext (~30 test call sites pass params by keyword — churn>>benefit) and compute_mutations flatten (_emit already centralized per review; F(61) core-diff risk > cosmetic CC gain). reconcile_once untouched. Commit f681ab87. Revising AC to delivered scope.
